name: cloudcraft-mcp
description: Unofficial Cloudcraft architecture blueprint access through MCP
long_description: List, inspect, create, update, delete, and export Cloudcraft architecture blueprints through a local Model Context Protocol server. The API key stays in the extension host's sensitive configuration and is sent only to the configured Cloudcraft API endpoint.

cloudcraft_api_key.title: Cloudcraft API key
cloudcraft_api_key.description: Bearer API key generated in Cloudcraft user settings. It grants access to the associated Cloudcraft account.

enable_writes.title: Enable blueprint writes
enable_writes.description: Allow create and update operations. Disabled by default.

enable_deletes.title: Enable blueprint deletes
enable_deletes.description: Allow irreversible deletes. Writes must also be enabled, and the exact blueprint ID must be confirmed.
